zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Stourton於1433年出生在英國維爾爾時，她的父親Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton34歲，母親Margery Wadham51歲。她於1452年與Sir George Darrell結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年7月27日在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年41歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾拉姆斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Stourton was born in 1433, in Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton, was 34 and her mother, Margery Wadham, was 51. She married Sir George Darrell in 1452. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 27 July 1474, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Stourton est née en 1433, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margery Wadham, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Darrell en 1452. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 juillet 1474, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1452 Sir George Darrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Juli 1474 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

Knight, Ist Baron Stourton, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margery Wadham, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Darrell nel 1452. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 27 luglio 1474, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Stourton(이)가 1433년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Wadham(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1452년 Sir George Darrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 7월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 램스버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Stourton родилась в 1433 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Stourton, KT. Knight, Ist Baron Stourton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Wadham, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Darrell в 1452 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 27 июля 1474 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия.
